name_en: ❤️30Montaigne Avenue East-West chain bag series, carefully crafted with blue oblique Monogram fabric 📝, the flap is decorated with the iconic lettering buckle, stylish and elegant, with multiple card slots inside, and comes with a zippered pouch 👏🏻, greatly improving practicality, it is an essential chain bag for daily wear 😘
